Hey, I'm Tosin — an IT Systems Operations Specialist and Azure Cloud Administrator passionate about keeping infrastructure secure and running at full strength. I specialize in identity & access management, cloud operations, and PowerShell automation. Whether it's provisioning 200+ endpoints, triaging security alerts, or building IaC pipelines — this is my work. Take a look around and see what I've built.

Get In Touch → View Projects
Azure Administration + Identity & Access Management + PowerShell Automation + Cloud Infrastructure + ISO 27001 / NIST 800-53 + ServiceNow ITSM + Endpoint Management + Terraform & Ansible + Azure Administration + Identity & Access Management + PowerShell Automation + Cloud Infrastructure + ISO 27001 / NIST 800-53 + ServiceNow ITSM + Endpoint Management + Terraform & Ansible +
About
HOW I GOT HERE
& WHERE I'M GOING.
"Curiosity turned into a career — once I saw how cloud systems break, I knew I wanted to be the one who keeps them running."

My journey into IT started with a genuine fascination with how systems work and how they fail. Early on I found myself diving into infrastructure automation, identity management, and cloud security — the operational side clicked for me naturally.

That drive led me to pursue certifications that reflect where I operate — the AZ-104 Azure Administrator gave me the technical foundation, CompTIA Security+ sharpened my security mindset, and ITIL Foundation grounded my approach to service delivery. Each was a deliberate investment, not just a checkbox.

Today I bring 3+ years of hands-on experience supporting enterprise infrastructure at Tiatra, Cox Enterprises, and International Tech Solutions — managing everything from 200-user Active Directory environments to daily security triage and PowerShell automation suites that cut manual work by 40%.

5+Certifications
4+Technical Projects
3+Years Experience
200+Endpoints Managed
Experience
Mar 2025
— May 2026
Tiatra — Atlanta, GA
IT Systems Operations Specialist
  • Performed day-to-day IT operations supporting 200+ end-users across Windows Server & Windows 11 enterprise environments — hardware provisioning, onboarding, and infrastructure support.
  • Administered Microsoft Azure environments including resource configurations, access updates, subscription management, and cloud service monitoring, applying AZ-104 certified expertise.
  • Managed full user lifecycle in Microsoft Entra ID and Active Directory — account creation, MFA enrollment, RBAC assignments, and deprovisioning aligned with ISO 27001.
  • Administered Exchange Online and email security (DKIM, SPF, anti-spam), maintaining secure mail delivery organization-wide.
  • Processed 50+ ServiceNow tickets/week, maintaining SLA compliance and producing documentation that improved first-time resolution rates.
  • Built PowerShell automation scripts for bulk AD provisioning, health monitoring, and alerting — reducing manual tasks by approximately 40%.
01
Nov 2024
— Feb 2025
Cox Enterprises — Atlanta, GA
Cybersecurity Analyst
  • Monitored and triaged 100+ daily security alerts using Palo Alto Panorama and CyberArk PAM — identifying unauthorized access attempts and anomalous activity.
  • Administered CyberArk PAM workflows contributing to a 15% reduction in onboarding cycle time while maintaining ISO 27001 compliance.
  • Enforced conditional access policies, MFA, and DLP concepts to protect organizational data and infrastructure.
02

International Tech Solutions — Atlanta, GA
Cloud Support Engineer

  • Supported RBAC assignments, MFA enrollment, and resource access configuration across Azure and M365.
  • Collaborated with senior engineers in Agile/Scrum cycles to deliver cloud support initiatives on schedule.
